title: Building Agent Teams with Claude (Not Just Watching Them)
excerpt: The last post explained how Claude Code uses subagents. This one shows you how to build the same pattern yourself with the Anthropic SDK — orchestrators, workers, parallel runs, and all.

title: Claude Code Has Interns Now (They're Also Claude)
excerpt: Claude Code can spin up specialized sub-agents to do your bidding. I watched it happen in real time and now I understand what's going on.

title: How This Site Is Hosted for ~$12 a Year
excerpt: GitHub Pages handles the hosting for free. Namecheap sells the domain for about $12. That's the whole bill. Here's exactly how it works.

title: Building This Site with Claude Code (Yes, Including This Post)
excerpt: A meta look at how I used Claude Code to build and style this site — from the initial scaffold to this very post, prompts included.
